scripts.setup:dist: rimraf dist && mkdirp dist && copyfiles -u 1 client/index.html dist
scripts.minify:js: terser dist/bundle.js --compress --mangle --comments=false -o dist/bundle.min.js && shx mv dist/bundle.min.js dist/bundle.js
scripts.prebuild: npm run lint && npm run setup:dist
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run bundle:js && npm run minify:js
scripts.predebug: npm run lint && npm run setup:dist
scripts.debug: npm run build:css && npm run bundle:js
scripts.run: npm install && npm run build && npm start
